ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position played by the player */,
  "team" TEXT /* Team the player is associated with */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date when the player joined the organization */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the player (e.g., active, injured) */,
  "player_number" TEXT /* The jersey number of the player */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* The date of birth of the player */,
  "height" TEXT /* The height of the player */,
  "weight" TEXT /* The weight of the player */,
  "batting_hand" TEXT /* The hand the player bats with (e.g., right, left) */,
  "throwing_hand" TEXT /* The hand the player throws with (e.g., right, left) */,
  "salary" INTEGER /* The player's salary */,
  "contract_expiration" TEXT /* The date when the player's contract expires */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pitchers" (
  "pitcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pitcher */,
  "pitcher_name" TEXT /* Name of the pitcher */,
  "team" TEXT /* Team the pitcher is associated with */,
  "ERA" REAL /* Earned Run Average of the pitcher */,
  "WHIP" REAL /* Walks and Hits per Innings Pitched */,
  "BAA" REAL /* Batting Average Against the pitcher */,
  "pitching_hand" TEXT /* The hand the pitcher throws with (e.g., right, left) */,
  "pitch_types" TEXT /* A comma-separated list of pitch types the pitcher uses (e.g., fastball, curveball, slider) */,
  "strikeouts_per_9_innings" REAL /* The number of strikeouts the pitcher averages per 9 innings */,
  "walks_per_9_innings" REAL /* The number of walks the pitcher averages per 9 innings */,
  "hits_per_9_innings" REAL /* The number of hits the pitcher allows per 9 innings */,
  "home_runs_per_9_innings" REAL /* The number of home runs the pitcher allows per 9 innings */,
  "ground_ball_percentage" REAL /* The percentage of ground balls the pitcher induces */,
  "fly_ball_percentage" REAL /* The percentage of fly balls the pitcher induces */,
  "strikeout_percentage" REAL /* The percentage of batters the pitcher strikes out */,
  "walk_percentage" REAL /* The percentage of batters the pitcher walks */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pitcher_id")
)
column_names: Unique identifier for each player
Full name of the player
Position played by the player
Team the player is associated with
